name: libdynaloader-functions-perl
title: libdynaloader-functions-perl
description:
deconstructed dynamic C library loading
DynaLoader::Functions provides a function-based interface
to dynamic loading as used by Perl.
Some details of dynamic loading are very platform-dependent,
so correct use of these functions requires the programmer
to be mindful of the space of platform variations.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdynaloader-functions-perl because deconstructed dynamic C library loading.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdynaloader-functions-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdynaloader-functions-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdynaloader-functions-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
